title: Union of disjoint object shapes
description: mion union.spec.ts 'Union Obj'. Object-typed union members go through the dependency-call layer with the shared `typeof === 'object' && !== null` guard lifted out of the OR-chain.
notes: An input passes if it satisfies AT LEAST one arm's required props; extra props are ignored (structural), so `{a: "x", aa: true, b: 1}` passes via the `{b: number}` arm. A failing value reports a single `expected: "union"` at the root, not per-arm errors.
pureType: createValidate<{a: string; aa: boolean} | {b: number} | {c: bigint}>()
generated: function YOw_wG8YsEQ(v){return ((typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && ((typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.a === 'string' && typeof v.aa === 'boolean') || (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && Number.isFinite(v.b)) || (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.c === 'bigint'))))}
